scene_imagination: single string; verb-led scratchpad (focus:, define:, refine:, visualize:, analyze:); ~6-12 prompts; under ~250 words

subjects.description: full visual description of the subject
subjects.appearance_details: additional visual details (accessories, texture, distinguishing features)
subjects.relationship: how this subject relates to others or to the scene
subjects.orientation: direction subject faces relative to camera
subjects.clothing: clothing and accessories; '' if non-human or N/A
subjects.expression: facial expression; '' if non-human or N/A
subjects.facial_features: notable facial features; '' if non-human or not visible
subjects.number_of_subjects: int; total in this subject's group; 0 if N/A

subject_details.<key_name>: free-form image-specific structured attribute; keys vary per image; {} if N/A

background_setting: the setting / environment in which the image is set
style_medium: rendering style and medium (e.g., 'photoreal photograph', 'oil-painting style')

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: how the text appears (font style, color, size)
text_and_signage_elements.spatial: where in the image the text appears
text_and_signage_elements.context: narrative or situational context for the text

quadrant_scan.top_left: what is in the top-left region
quadrant_scan.top_right: what is in the top-right region
quadrant_scan.bottom_left: what is in the bottom-left region
quadrant_scan.bottom_right: what is in the bottom-right region
quadrant_scan.absolute_center: what is in the dead-center of the frame
